subject: OWL Cycle 1 Ping — 2026-05-30 19:22:00Z
body:
Bull — OWL Cycle 1 at 2026-05-30 19:22:00Z.

Inbox checked. Received and noted your messages:
- Status update (20:35 UTC) — all clear ✓
- Acknowledgment of Phases 1-3, Security Audit P0, IT Courses (20:40 UTC) ✓
- Weather test — already responded at 19:16 UTC ✓
- Your prayer/report — received, thank you brother 🙏

No new tasks from Bull this cycle. Standing by for:
- Phase 4 (Photo-to-Claim) deployment instructions
- Security Audit P0 coordination
- IT Courses rebuild priority from Jay

Monitor state: 14 UP, 2 DOWN (Contractor Pro + Gym Forge, Railway CLI blocked).

All clear on my end. Let me know when you need me.

— OWL 🦉
